title:
Case No. C30575718, SKC-2/2025. Decision of the Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia (Senate) of 13 May 2025. ECLI:LV:AT:2025:0513.C30575718.22.S,

Latvia
text:
Supreme Court of the Republic of
Latvia as the court of cassation does not examine the merits of the case, but
provides an explanation of the interpretation and application of substantive
and procedural legal norms. The main legal issue to be resolved in the case was
whether it is sufficient for the trademark owner to prove the use of the
trademark in connection with at least one service from each class of services
in order for the trademark to be considered used for all services in that class
for which it is registered.
issuing_authority: Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia
